sentences.t: 我得学习，但我不想学。
sentences.en: I have to study, but I don't feel like it.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi xuéxí, dàn wǒ bù xiǎng xué.

sentences.t: 我不困，但我得睡了。
sentences.en: I'm not sleepy, but I have to sleep.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú kùn, dàn wǒ děi shuì le.

sentences.t: 我边吃饭边学一点西班牙语。
sentences.en: While I eat, I study a little Spanish.
sentences.r: Wǒ biān chīfàn biān xué yìdiǎn Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.t: 我花了半个小时找我把车停哪儿了。
sentences.en: I've spent half an hour looking for where I left the car.
sentences.r: Wǒ huā le bàn ge xiǎoshí zhǎo wǒ bǎ chē tíng nǎr le.

sentences.t: 一家人都在厨房聊天。
sentences.en: The whole family's in the kitchen talking.
sentences.r: Yìjiā rén dōu zài chúfáng liáotiān.

sentences.t: 你周末喜欢做什么？
sentences.en: What do you like to do on weekends?
sentences.r: Nǐ zhōumò xǐhuan zuò shénme?

sentences.t: 这周末我想做点不一样的。
sentences.en: I want to do something different this weekend.
sentences.r: Zhè zhōumò wǒ xiǎng zuò diǎn bù yíyàng de.

sentences.t: 天一冷我就想待在家里。
sentences.en: The cold makes me want to stay home.
sentences.r: Tiān yì lěng wǒ jiù xiǎng dāi zài jiā lǐ.

sentences.t: 我想尝一点你的。
sentences.en: I'm going to try a bit of yours.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng cháng yìdiǎn nǐ de.

sentences.t: 我住在一个特别漂亮的公园旁边。
sentences.en: I live next to a really nice park.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhù zài yí ge tèbié piàoliang de gōngyuán pángbiān.

sentences.t: 会议是星期一十点。
sentences.en: The meeting is Monday at ten.
sentences.r: Huìyì shì xīngqīyī shí diǎn.

sentences.t: 走两条街然后往左拐。
sentences.en: Go two streets and turn left.
sentences.r: Zǒu liǎng tiáo jiē ránhòu wǎng zuǒ guǎi.

sentences.t: 我没时间吃饭，因为我工作太多。
sentences.en: I don't have time to eat because I work a lot.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi shíjiān chīfàn, yīnwèi wǒ gōngzuò tài duō.

sentences.t: 每天学一点，我状态就好。
sentences.en: I'm good when I study a little every day.
sentences.r: Měitiān xué yìdiǎn, wǒ zhuàngtài jiù hǎo.

sentences.t: 从我学会说西班牙语起就认识马可了。
sentences.en: I've known Marco since I learned to speak Spanish.
sentences.r: Cóng wǒ xuéhuì shuō Xībānyáyǔ qǐ jiù rènshi Marco le.

sentences.t: 我睡得晚，因为我晚上学习。
sentences.en: I go to bed late because I study at night.
sentences.r: Wǒ shuì de wǎn, yīnwèi wǒ wǎnshang xuéxí.

sentences.t: 说实话，我不知道你是谁。
sentences.en: Honestly, I don't know who you are.
sentences.r: Shuō shíhuà, wǒ bù zhīdào nǐ shì shéi.

sentences.t: 她懂得多，因为她认识好多人。
sentences.en: She knows a lot because she knows a lot of people.
sentences.r: Tā dǒng de duō, yīnwèi tā rènshi hǎoduō rén.

sentences.t: 我太喜欢了，明天还要再来。
sentences.en: I liked it so much that I'm coming back tomorrow.
sentences.r: Wǒ tài xǐhuan le, míngtiān hái yào zài lái.

sentences.t: 睡了一会儿，我现在好点了。
sentences.en: I feel better now that I slept a bit.
sentences.r: Shuì le yíhuìr, wǒ xiànzài hǎo diǎn le.

sentences.t: 我得在五点前把这个做完。
sentences.en: I have to finish this before five.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi zài wǔ diǎn qián bǎ zhège zuò wán.

sentences.t: 我们慢慢来，不着急。
sentences.en: We'll go little by little, no rush.
sentences.r: Wǒmen mànman lái, bù zháojí.

sentences.t: 不学完我不睡觉。
sentences.en: I don't go to bed until I finish studying.
sentences.r: Bù xué wán wǒ bù shuìjiào.

sentences.t: 我们住在一套小公寓，不过挺好。
sentences.en: We live in a small apartment but it's fine.
sentences.r: Wǒmen zhù zài yí tào xiǎo gōngyù, búguò tǐng hǎo.

sentences.t: 我打算等它便宜点再说。
sentences.en: I'm going to wait until it's cheaper.
sentences.r: Wǒ dǎsuàn děng tā piányi diǎn zài shuō.

sentences.t: 我就是我，这就已经够了。
sentences.en: I'm just me, and that's already plenty.
sentences.r: Wǒ jiùshì wǒ, zhè jiù yǐjīng gòu le.

sentences.t: 她很担心，因为你不舒服。
sentences.en: She's worried because you're not okay.
sentences.r: Tā hěn dānxīn, yīnwèi nǐ bù shūfu.

sentences.t: 我今天要尽我所能。
sentences.en: I'm going to do everything I can today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān yào jìn wǒ suǒ néng.

sentences.t: 我房间在楼上，挨着卫生间。
sentences.en: My room's upstairs, next to the bathroom.
sentences.r: Wǒ fángjiān zài lóushàng, āizhe wèishēngjiān.

sentences.t: 医生说没什么大问题。
sentences.en: The doctor says it's nothing serious.
sentences.r: Yīshēng shuō méi shénme dà wèntí.

sentences.t: 这本书比那本有意思。
sentences.en: This book is more interesting than the other one.
sentences.r: Zhè běn shū bǐ nà běn yǒuyìsi.

sentences.t: 我家比你家小。
sentences.en: My house is smaller than yours.
sentences.r: Wǒ jiā bǐ nǐ jiā xiǎo.

sentences.t: 马可说他要去大脑健身房了。
sentences.en: Marco says he's off to the brain gym.
sentences.r: Marco shuō tā yào qù dànǎo jiànshēnfáng le.

sentences.t: 你几点到都没关系，我等你。
sentences.en: It doesn't matter when you get here, I'll wait for you.
sentences.r: Nǐ jǐ diǎn dào dōu méi guānxi, wǒ děng nǐ.

sentences.t: 问问自己为什么想学，一切就都不一样了。
sentences.en: Ask yourself why you want to learn, and everything changes.
sentences.r: Wènwen zìjǐ wèishénme xiǎng xué, yíqiè jiù dōu bù yíyàng le.

sentences.t: 你该为自己做到的事感到骄傲。
sentences.en: You should be proud of what you've done.
sentences.r: Nǐ gāi wèi zìjǐ zuòdào de shì gǎndào jiāo'ào.

sentences.t: 外面冷，我们待在家里吧。
sentences.en: It's cold outside, let's stay home.
sentences.r: Wàimiàn lěng, wǒmen dāi zài jiā lǐ ba.

sentences.t: 马可从不生病，他只是在“刻苦训练”。
sentences.en: Marco is never sick, he's just "training hard."
sentences.r: Marco cóng bù shēngbìng, tā zhǐshì zài "kèkǔ xùnliàn".

sentences.t: 我想多学点，但我时间太少。
sentences.en: I'd like to learn more, but I have little time.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng duō xué diǎn, dàn wǒ shíjiān tài shǎo.

sentences.t: 要是想说得好，我就得多学。
sentences.en: I have to study more if I want to speak well.
sentences.r: Yàoshi xiǎng shuō de hǎo, wǒ jiù děi duō xué.

sentences.t: 我头疼的时候没法工作。
sentences.en: When my head hurts, I can't work.
sentences.r: Wǒ tóu téng de shíhou méi fǎ gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我觉得我病了，因为浑身都疼。
sentences.en: I think I'm sick because everything hurts.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde wǒ bìng le, yīnwèi húnshēn dōu téng.

sentences.t: 我们得买吃的，因为家里什么都没有了。
sentences.en: We have to buy food because we don't have anything.
sentences.r: Wǒmen děi mǎi chī de, yīnwèi jiā lǐ shénme dōu méiyǒu le.

sentences.t: 我一饿就对谁都没耐心。
sentences.en: When I'm hungry, I have no patience with anyone.
sentences.r: Wǒ yí è jiù duì shéi dōu méi nàixīn.

sentences.t: 我想学习，但又困。
sentences.en: I feel like learning, but I'm also sleepy.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng xuéxí, dàn yòu kùn.

sentences.t: 我不喜欢你说你不行。
sentences.en: I don't like it when you say you can't.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù xǐhuan nǐ shuō nǐ bùxíng.

sentences.t: 我不该吃那么多，可是太好吃了。
sentences.en: I shouldn't eat so much, but it's so good.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù gāi chī nàme duō, kěshì tài hǎochī le.

sentences.t: 虽然我很忙，但我随时都愿意帮忙。
sentences.en: Even though I'm busy, I'm always ready to help.
sentences.r: Suīrán wǒ hěn máng, dàn wǒ suíshí dōu yuànyì bāngmáng.

sentences.t: 等你回来，我就把一切都准备好了。
sentences.en: By the time you're back, I'll have everything ready.
sentences.r: Děng nǐ huílái, wǒ jiù bǎ yíqiè dōu zhǔnbèi hǎo le.

sentences.t: 我们现在走的话，就能准时到。
sentences.en: If we leave now, we'll get there on time.
sentences.r: Wǒmen xiànzài zǒu de huà, jiù néng zhǔnshí dào.

sentences.t: 天热，所以我们去海边。
sentences.en: It's hot, so we're going to the beach.
sentences.r: Tiān rè, suǒyǐ wǒmen qù hǎibiān.

sentences.t: 他吃饭、工作、学习，然后睡觉。
sentences.en: He eats, works, studies, and then goes to bed.
sentences.r: Tā chīfàn、gōngzuò、xuéxí, ránhòu shuìjiào.

sentences.t: 他睡觉的时候，我起来学习。
sentences.en: While he sleeps, I get up and study.
sentences.r: Tā shuìjiào de shíhou, wǒ qǐlái xuéxí.

sentences.t: 我觉得你比我强。
sentences.en: I think you're stronger than me.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde nǐ bǐ wǒ qiáng.

sentences.t: 我小时候，我家更大。
sentences.en: When I was a kid, my house was bigger.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎoshíhou, wǒ jiā gèng dà.

sentences.t: 我准备好了，但她还没准备好。
sentences.en: I'm ready, but she's not ready yet.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhǔnbèi hǎo le, dàn tā hái méi zhǔnbèi hǎo.

sentences.t: 我们很开心，但也有点紧张。
sentences.en: We're happy, but also a little nervous.
sentences.r: Wǒmen hěn kāixīn, dàn yě yǒudiǎn jǐnzhāng.

sentences.t: 我每次来这儿都想留下。
sentences.en: Every time I come here, I want to stay.
sentences.r: Wǒ měi cì lái zhèr dōu xiǎng liúxià.

sentences.t: 我不知道答案，但我知道怎么查。
sentences.en: I don't know the answer, but I know how to look it up.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào dá'àn, dàn wǒ zhīdào zěnme chá.

sentences.t: 我知道答案，但我不认识老师。
sentences.en: I know the answer, but I don't know the teacher.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào dá'àn, dàn wǒ bú rènshi lǎoshī.

sentences.t: 我认识一些自以为什么都懂的人。
sentences.en: I know people who think they know everything.
sentences.r: Wǒ rènshi yìxiē zì yǐwéi shénme dōu dǒng de rén.

sentences.t: 我不知道多少钱，但我肯定很贵。
sentences.en: I don't know how much it costs, but I'm sure it's expensive.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào duōshao qián, dàn wǒ kěndìng hěn guì.

sentences.t: 我之前嗓子疼，但现在好了。
sentences.en: My throat was hurting, but I'm better now.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīqián sǎngzi téng, dàn xiànzài hǎo le.

sentences.t: 我喜欢这种生活，虽然它不完美。
sentences.en: I like this life, even though it's not perfect.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan zhè zhǒng shēnghuó, suīrán tā bù wánměi.

sentences.t: 你知道问题，但你不知道答案。
sentences.en: You know the problem, but you don't know the solution.
sentences.r: Nǐ zhīdào wèntí, dàn nǐ bù zhīdào dá'àn.

sentences.t: 我在家工作的时候，就在厨房吃饭。
sentences.en: When I work from home, I eat in the kitchen.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài jiā gōngzuò de shíhou, jiù zài chúfáng chīfàn.

sentences.t: 你困的话需要的是睡觉，不是更多咖啡。
sentences.en: If you're sleepy, you need sleep, not more coffee.
sentences.r: Nǐ kùn de huà xūyào de shì shuìjiào, bú shì gèng duō kāfēi.

sentences.t: 马可说他准备好了，但其实很紧张。
sentences.en: Marco says he's ready, but he's nervous.
sentences.r: Marco shuō tā zhǔnbèi hǎo le, dàn qíshí hěn jǐnzhāng.

sentences.t: 我想睡个懒觉，但我得工作。
sentences.en: I'd like to sleep in, but I have to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng shuì ge lǎnjiào, dàn wǒ děi gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我一饿就点看到的第一个。
sentences.en: When I'm hungry, I order the first thing I see.
sentences.r: Wǒ yí è jiù diǎn kàndào de dì-yī ge.

sentences.t: 他跟我说便宜，结果花了好多钱。
sentences.en: He told me it was cheap, but it cost a lot.
sentences.r: Tā gēn wǒ shuō piányi, jiéguǒ huā le hǎoduō qián.

sentences.t: 我知道我能变得更好，只要坚持下去。
sentences.en: I know I can get better, I just have to keep going.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhīdào wǒ néng biàn de gèng hǎo, zhǐyào jiānchí xiàqù.

sentences.t: 你手机又在床底下了。
sentences.en: Your phone's under the bed again.
sentences.r: Nǐ shǒujī yòu zài chuáng dǐxia le.

sentences.t: 我工作一整天，然后再学一会儿。
sentences.en: I work all day and then study a bit.
sentences.r: Wǒ gōngzuò yì zhěng tiān, ránhòu zài xué yíhuìr.

sentences.t: 猫一整天都在床上。
sentences.en: The cat spends all day on the bed.
sentences.r: Māo yì zhěng tiān dōu zài chuáng shàng.

sentences.t: 你知道他为什么还没见过我家人吗？
sentences.en: Do you know why he hasn't met my family yet?
sentences.r: Nǐ zhīdào tā wèishénme hái méi jiàn guò wǒ jiārén ma?

sentences.t: 我在那家吃过一次，挺喜欢的。
sentences.en: I ate at that place once and I liked it.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài nà jiā chī guò yí cì, tǐng xǐhuan de.

sentences.t: 他是墨西哥人，我是西班牙人。
sentences.en: He's from Mexico and I'm from Spain.
sentences.r: Tā shì Mòxīgē rén, wǒ shì Xībānyá rén.

sentences.t: 我想了解你的故事，也想知道你从哪儿来。
sentences.en: I want to know your story and learn where you come from.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng liǎojiě nǐ de gùshi, yě xiǎng zhīdào nǐ cóng nǎr lái.

sentences.t: 我裹在被子里不想出来。
sentences.en: I'm under the blankets and I don't want to get out.
sentences.r: Wǒ guǒ zài bèizi lǐ bù xiǎng chūlái.

sentences.t: 演唱会是晚上九点。
sentences.en: The concert is at nine at night.
sentences.r: Yǎnchànghuì shì wǎnshang jiǔ diǎn.

sentences.t: 我要少买点东西，多存点钱。
sentences.en: I'm going to buy fewer things and save more money.
sentences.r: Wǒ yào shǎo mǎi diǎn dōngxi, duō cún diǎn qián.

sentences.t: 以前我完全不会说，现在能说一点了。
sentences.en: Before I didn't speak at all and now I speak a little.
sentences.r: Yǐqián wǒ wánquán bú huì shuō, xiànzài néng shuō yìdiǎn le.

sentences.t: 你为什么总把东西放在桌上？
sentences.en: Why do you always leave your stuff on the table?
sentences.r: Nǐ wèishénme zǒng bǎ dōngxi fàng zài zhuō shàng?

sentences.t: 马可说：迷路也是一种探索方式。
sentences.en: Marco says: getting lost is just another way to explore.
sentences.r: Marco shuō: mílù yěshì yì zhǒng tànsuǒ fāngshì.

sentences.t: 她不知道我认识她好多年了。
sentences.en: She doesn't know that I've known her for years.
sentences.r: Tā bù zhīdào wǒ rènshi tā hǎoduō nián le.

sentences.t: 我没去派对，因为我真的太累了。
sentences.en: I didn't go to the party because I was really tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi qù pàiduì, yīnwèi wǒ zhēn de tài lèi le.

sentences.t: 我不太饿，点个小份的就行。
sentences.en: I'm not very hungry, I'll order something small.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú tài è, diǎn ge xiǎo fèn de jiù xíng.

sentences.t: 马可说运动是最好的药。
sentences.en: Marco says exercise is the best pill.
sentences.r: Marco shuō yùndòng shì zuì hǎo de yào.

sentences.t: 我饿得要把所有东西都点了。
sentences.en: I'm so hungry I'm going to order everything.
sentences.r: Wǒ è de yào bǎ suǒyǒu dōngxi dōu diǎn le.

sentences.t: 我房间就挨着卫生间，太走运了。
sentences.en: My room's right next to the bathroom, lucky me.
sentences.r: Wǒ fángjiān jiù āizhe wèishēngjiān, tài zǒuyùn le.

sentences.t: 我不知道是点咖啡还是来点更带劲的。
sentences.en: I don't know whether to order coffee or something stronger.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào shì diǎn kāfēi háishi lái diǎn gèng dàijìn de.

sentences.t: 他跟我说他从没跟任何人讲过那件事。
sentences.en: He told me he'd never told that to anyone.
sentences.r: Tā gēn wǒ shuō tā cóng méi gēn rènhé rén jiǎng guò nà jiàn shì.
